Mobility Operating System

Every commute.
Optimized for you.

NOMAD learns how you travel and recommends the best transportation decisions based on time, cost, safety, and environmental impact.

Fastest Option 28 mins
Namma Metro (Purple Line) 35
Leaves in 3 mins. Low density coach.
80% Less Carbon 42 mins
Nomad Smart E-Bike 60
Sunny morning. Safe lane along HAL road.
AC Comfort Cab 65 mins
Nomad Shared Cab 180
Heavy traffic at Marathahalli. Expected delay.
Vehicle Link 94%
Air Quality 112 AQI
Local Sky 29°C
Discover Nomad
Commuting Redefined

Intelligent routing. Clear decisions.

Save Time

NOMAD dynamically coordinates train departures, traffic flows, and electric shuttle queues in real-time, matching you with the absolute fastest path home.

Save Money

Compare fares across transit networks and shared fleets instantly. Connect your passes into a single smart wallet that automatically finds the cheapest routing ticket.

Reduce Carbon

Factor emission offsets into every travel decision. Track personal footprint reduction progress, prioritize zero-emission vehicles, and unlock green reward credits.
